title: Sniff's Shoji
body:
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2af7b8cd424ce47f7e9c45120df78fb4d9014c5c_0.webp)

Sniff's Shoji is a small mod that adds some Japanese blocks like:

Shoji door:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
A Shoji is a sliding door with custom sounds. not much else.
</details>

Paper walls:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
There are 2 types: patterned and normal.
</details>

Paper lanterns:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Paper lanterns come in different colors and can be hung under each other.

</details>

Stone lantern:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A Lantern made of stone :)

</details>
